naturalLanguageQuery: sort all faqs and trust controls by category
generatedSQL:
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT "category", "question" AS "faqQuestion", NULL AS "controlShort", NULL AS "controlLong"
  FROM "allTrustFaqs"
  UNION ALL
  SELECT "category", NULL AS "faqQuestion", "short" AS "controlShort", "long" AS "controlLong"
  FROM "allTrustControls"
) AS combined
ORDER BY "category";
